scripts.test:fast: npm --prefix sdk run test:fast && npm --prefix mcp run test:fast && pytest -m "not full"
scripts.test:full: npm --prefix sdk run test:full && npm --prefix mcp run test:full && pytest -m "not manual"
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix sdk run coverage && npm --prefix mcp run coverage && pytest -m "not manual" --cov=scripts --cov-branch --cov-fail-under=90
